configurations.name: Static File Server
runtimeArgs: import sys; sys.path=[p for p in sys.path if p]; import os,socketserver,http.server; os.chdir('/Users/eseul/Desktop/Lizwebsite Notion Ver/lizwebsite-notion-ver'); httpd=socketserver.TCPServer(('',8080),http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler); print('Serving on http://localhost:8080'); httpd.serve_forever()
